prompt: Create a breathtaking surreal cinematic digital artwork of a young adult man floating weightlessly above a massive city rooftop at night, viewed in a vertical 3:4 frame. The man is positioned slightly left of center, reclining horizontally in midair as if gravity has stopped: torso leaning back, head near the upper-left center, one arm hanging down, knees bent, legs extending toward the right, wearing a dark charcoal long overcoat, gray hoodie, black pants, and black-and-white sneakers. Use a realistic but dreamlike composited style with dramatic depth of field and soft motion blur. The background is a dense modern city skyline with high-rise buildings, glowing windows, bokeh streetlights, and a low rooftop ledge across the bottom third. The sky is deep navy blue and full of tiny stars. Fill the sky with exactly 96 glowing warm orange paper sky lanterns: 9 large close lanterns around the edges and upper sky, 27 medium lanterns scattered across the upper and middle sky, and 60 small distant lantern lights receding into the background in loose diagonal streams. Add exactly 22 small orange ember streaks drifting in the lower half of the image, plus a faint smoky haze over the rooftop surface. Lighting should come mainly from the lanterns, casting warm amber highlights on the man’s coat and shoes while the city remains cool blue-gray. Emphasize scale, wonder, and levitation, with the largest lantern near the center-right glowing brightly and the man suspended above the blurred urban nightscape. No text, no watermark, no extra people.
